title: SUMMER FOOD PROGRAM - 211info
text: FOOD FOR LANE COUNTY SUMMER FOOD PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides meals at parks and community sites. To locate the meal sites, use the website for the current list. Eligibility: Age 18 and under Hours: Monday-Friday 11:30am-12:30pm Email (541) 343-2822 117 . Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 343-2822 Main phone Main phone (541) 343-2822 ext 117 Youth And Family Programs Coordinator [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Cities of Coburg, Creswell, Eugene, Junction City, Springfield, Veneta SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Summer Food Service Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - COMMODITY SUPPLEMENTAL FOOD PROGRAM FOOD - FOOD PROGRAMS FOOD - MEALS ON WHEELS EUGENE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
